1. Behold, I say unto you, that you shall let your time be devoted
 to the studying of the Scriptures, and to preaching, and to
 confirming the Church at Colesville, and to performing your labors
 on the land, such as is required, until after you shall go to the
 west to hold the next conference; and then it shall be made known
 what you shall do.

1 Behold, I say unto you that you shall let your time be devoted to the studying of the scriptures, and to preaching, and to confirming the church at Colesville, and to performing your labors on the land, such as is required, until after you shall go to the west to hold the next conference; and then it shall be made known what you shall do.
And all things shall be done by common consent in the church, by much prayer and faith, for all things you shall receive by faith. Amen.

faith, to organize the Church of Jesus Christ according to the will of heaven, by revelation and commandment from the Most High. In order to show you that that which I have spoken is according to the law of our Church, I will read a small portion of instructions which emanated from him whom we esteem a great Prophet. Talking of the government of the Church and the people in July, 1830, these…
